name: Road Rush
short_description: With its easy controls, retro tunes, and familiar scenery, this endless runner arcade game will get your adrenaline flowing. Jump, run, and dodge – play Road Rush, where every reaction is crucial.
detailed_description:
Road Rush is an arcade-like game, where only speed and careful timing will keep you alive. Score as many points as possible by taking risks – the faster you skate, the more points you’ll get - but watch out for traffic, dogs, pedestrians, and construction.

Master the balance of risk and reward by picking up items for health and points, then share your highest scores on the leaderboard. Use your reflexes to avoid colliding with cars and other obstacles, otherwise it’s Game Over!

Key Features:

  • '80s Nostalgia: Roller skate your way through “totally tubular” roads and highways. Leap, jet, and chill to avoid the obstacles, or you’re going to be asking yourself, “What’s your damage?” Experience the thrill of roller skating on a highway but better steer clear of road blocks - your life depends on it!

  • Subtle Art: 2D characters and bright palettes, all made by hand, 8-Bit inspired visual effects.

  • Arcade-like: Sounds, sights, and play ability that evokes classic arcade entertainment.
